entry.title: Entry #764 in IN RE: Social Media Adolescent Addiction/Personal Injury Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3047
entry.summary: ***TEXT ONLY NOTICE******ALL CASE DOCUMENTS SHALL CONTAIN A PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL PARTIES WHO DO NOT RECEIVE ELECTRONIC SERVICE THROUGH CM/ECF***NOTICE OF FILING OF CTO AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE (CTO-79) re: pldg. ( 763 in MDL No. 3047, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02289, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02350, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02351, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02369, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02370, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02373, 1 in NYS/1:26-cv-03631) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Oppositions due on or before 5/13/2026.Attorneys must be registered to file in the JPML. Please visit our website for Registration Information. Signed by Clerk of the Panel Jessica D. Birnbaum on 5/6/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3047, MN/0:26-cv-02289, MN/0:26-cv-02350, MN/0:26-cv-02351, MN/0:26-cv-02369, MN/0:26-cv-02370, MN/0:26-cv-02373, NYS/1:26-cv-03631 (CDA) (Entered: 05/06/2026)
